blocks.text: Ronde van Vlaanderen headlines a massive Sunday for Norwegian sport
Seven Norwegians hit the cobbles at cycling's most brutal Monument, Casper Ruud hunts Monte-Carlo clay glory, and Suzuka delivers early F1 fireworks — Sunday, April 5 is a full day at the screen.
🚴 Tour of Flanders — Seven Norwegians including Wærenskjold, Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard chase Monument glory from Antwerp to Oudenaarde at 10:00
🎮 PGL CS2 Major Bucharest 2026 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) represents Norway at the biggest CS2 event of 2026, kicks off 02:00 Monday
